Executive Assistant Opening

Prestigious law firm seeks sophisticated executive assistant. Must come from a refined background with exposure to high society and cultural events.

Requirements:
- Degree from top-tier university (Ivy League preferred)
- Well-traveled and cultured
- Familiarity with fine dining, opera, and classical arts
- Well-connected in professional circles
- Polished presentation befitting our upscale clientele

Candidates should be comfortable interacting with C-suite executives and high-net-worth individuals. Previous experience in elite corporate environments essential. We expect refined communication skills and the natural grace that comes from a privileged upbringing. This is not an entry-level position for those still finding their footing professionally.
